# Chapter 4: Nonlinear and robust control  (~110 pp)
- 4.1 Lyapunov stability (15) · 4.2 Linearisation and its limits (12) · 4.3 Sliding-mode control (12) · 4.4 Backstepping introduction (12) · 4.5 H-infinity control (15) · 4.6 Robust control under uncertainty (15) · 4.7 Saturation and anti-windup (15) · 4.8 Failure section: chattering in sliding mode, integrator wind-up, modelling-uncertainty surprises (14)

**Archetype**: control, stability, uncertainty. **Project**: implement a sliding-mode controller; observe and mitigate chatter. **Exercises**: 30.
